title: SlipperyPlus
description: A mod make all the blocks incredibly slippery!
body:
**For personal use only, please ask the server owner to use it on a multiplayer server.**

SlipperyPlus can make all the blocks incredibly slippery(Includes Blocks other than Minecraft).

This is a refabric version with high version Minecraft of [this mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slippery-mod) (based on the version with a small amount of friction). And it is a lot of fun especially when you play it with your friends!
